title: Virtual Scroll
description: Virtual scrolling directive efficiently renders large datasets by only displaying items visible in the viewport. It requires a height input from the user, defining the scrollable area. As the user scrolls, content is dynamically loaded and unloaded to optimize performance. The directive includes a ScrollEnd event for triggering actions when reaching the end of the list.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A basic example of using virtual scroll with large datasets

props.name: height
props.description: Required. Defines the height of the scrollable container area. This determines how much content is visible at once.

events.name: ScrollEnd
events.description: Emitted when the user scrolls to the end of the list. This can be used to implement infinite scrolling or load more data functionality.
